title: Crystal Clear Water
description: A resource pack that makes water crystal clear.
body:
Dive into crystal-clear waters with Crystal Clear Water – a lightweight texture pack that transforms Minecraft's oceans, rivers, and lakes into stunningly transparent vistas!

Key Features:

Ultra-Transparent Water: See straight to the ocean floor, revealing hidden shipwrecks, drowned zombies, and underwater caves with ease.

Enhanced Visibility: Perfect for builders, explorers and PvPers.

Performance-Friendly: Minimal file size with no impact on FPS.

Vanilla-Compatible: Works seamlessly with the default game and most resource packs.

Whether you're hunting for treasure, constructing underwater bases, or fighting underwater, Crystal Clear Water brings clarity to every splash. Download now and experience Minecraft's aquatic world like never before!

Note : crystal clear water is best with no fog setting.
